content.speakerText: So how's the client onboarding project coming along?
content.speakerTextCn: 客户入驻项目进展如何？
expectedAnswers: We’ve onboarded 82% of targets, up from 58% last quarter.
Progress is strong—we’ve met 8 out of 10 KPIs and are on track for the rest.
Good progress overall, with a 25% increase in onboarding rate compared to last month.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了项目进展状态
语言准确性：语法和数字使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用口语化但专业的表达方式
关键词覆盖：是否包含 onboarding, targets, KPIs, percentage 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Any major blockers slowing things down?
content.speakerTextCn: 有什么主要障碍拖慢进度吗？
expectedAnswers: We’re experiencing a delay in the CRM sync—our team is coordinating with their IT to resolve it by Friday.
Not really—just minor scheduling conflicts, nothing critical.
The main issue is document approval lag, but we’ve added a weekly reminder system to speed it up.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确说明障碍或确认无重大问题
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的动词搭配（e.g., experiencing a delay, resolving, speeding up）
表达自然度：是否避免过度消极或模糊，体现积极解决倾向
关键词覆盖：是否使用 blocker, delay, resolve, coordinate 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: What’s the status of the product launch timeline?
content.speakerTextCn: 产品发布的时间表进展如何？
expectedAnswers: We’re on schedule—beta testing finished two days early, and marketing materials are 90% complete.
Slightly delayed by vendor delays, but we’ve adjusted the timeline and still aim for the original launch date.
Everything’s on track. We’ve completed all internal milestones ahead of plan.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确汇报时间表状态（准时、延迟、提前）
语言准确性：是否使用正确时态和时间表达（on schedule, ahead of plan, adjusted timeline）
表达自然度：是否使用符合职场语境的流畅表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 timeline, on schedule, delayed, milestone, launch 等关键词
